settings.title: Cotton swabs
settings.text: They often push debris deeper instead of removing what is stuck in the hidden folds.

settings.title: Liquid drops
settings.text: They can pool at the bottom while missing the sticky debris clinging to the ear canal walls.

settings.title: Regular wipes
settings.text: They slide across the surface instead of wrapping with your finger and reaching the curves where the gunk hides.

settings.title: Current tools do not fail. They just cannot reach the real target.
settings.text: A dog's ear canal is shaped very differently from a human ear. The hidden folds and deeper curves are exactly where debris, wax, and irritation-prone buildup collect. Most tools simply cannot clean those areas properly.
settings.analogy_title: You need better control, not a harsher cleaner.
settings.analogy_text: PawPoint wraps around your finger so you can feel the curves, guide the wipe with precision, and clean the areas generic tools usually miss.

settings.title: You can guide the wipe with real control
settings.text: The early win is precision: you can feel the folds, follow the curves, and lift visible debris instead of poking blindly.

settings.title: The routine becomes faster to repeat
settings.text: Once the motion feels natural, many owners find ear checks and cleanups less messy, less frustrating, and easier to keep consistent.

settings.title: Maintenance gets easier to stay ahead of
settings.text: With recurring precision cleaning, the goal is a steadier hygiene routine that helps you manage buildup before it becomes a bigger hassle.

settings.eyebrow: How a precision routine usually feels
settings.title: A repeatable ear-care rhythm built around control, not guesswork.
settings.text: PawPoint works best when the routine feels predictable: first you reach the visible folds more cleanly, then repeat the process without stress, and over time maintenance becomes easier to stay on top of.

settings.title: Fit the wipe to your finger
settings.text: Slide the wipe over your index finger so you can guide angle, pressure, and reach more precisely.

settings.title: Follow the folds, not just the surface
settings.text: Use your finger to trace the natural curves where buildup usually hides instead of wiping only the outer surface.

settings.title: Lift buildup with controlled pressure
settings.text: Use gentle, guided pressure to remove visible debris instead of poking with a swab or flooding the ear with drops.

settings.title: Repeat on a routine you can keep
settings.text: The visible clean on the wipe makes the result easy to judge and easier to repeat before buildup turns into a bigger issue.

settings.question: How far should I clean with PawPoint?
settings.answer: PawPoint is designed for gentle, controlled cleaning of the visible folds and reachable curves of the ear without aggressive poking.

settings.question: What makes the routine feel more precise?
settings.answer: The finger-fit design helps you feel where you are cleaning, control the pressure, and follow the folds instead of guessing with loose wipes or swabs.

settings.question: How often should I use PawPoint?
settings.answer: That depends on your dog's needs, but PawPoint is designed to fit easily into a recurring maintenance routine before buildup gets harder to manage.
